label: Vector3f
documentation: A class representing a 3D vector with floating-point coordinates used for spatial calculations.

label: Vector3f
detail: new Vector3f(x: float, y: float, z: float): Vector3f
documentation: Creates an instance of the Vector3f class with specified x, y, and z coordinates.

label: Vector3f
documentation: Creates an instance of the Vector3f class from the Vector class from MTR's Transport Simulation Core.

label: x
documentation: Returns the X coordinate of the vector.

label: y
documentation: Returns the Y coordinate of the vector.

label: z
documentation: Returns the Z coordinate of the vector.

label: copy
documentation: Returns a copy of the vector that can be independently modified.

label: normalize
documentation: Normalizes the vector to a unit vector (length of 1) while preserving its direction.

label: add
detail: Vector3f.add(x: float, y: float, z: float): Vector3f
documentation: Adds the given x, y, z coordinates to the current vector.

label: add
documentation: Adds the coordinates of another Vector3f to the current vector.

label: sub
documentation: Subtracts the given vector from another Vector3f.

label: mul
detail: Vector3f.mul(x: float, y: float, z: float): Vector3f
documentation: Multiplies each coordinate by the specified numbers respectively.

label: mul
documentation: Multiplies each coordinate by the specified number.

label: rotX
documentation: Rotates the vector along the X axis by the specified angle in radians.

label: rotY
documentation: Rotates the vector along the Y axis by the specified angle in radians.

label: rotZ
documentation: Rotates the vector along the Z axis by the specified angle in radians.

label: cross
documentation: Performs a vector product with another vector. The result is perpendicular to both vectors.

label: distance
documentation: Returns the distance to the coordinates represented by the other vector.

label: distanceSq
documentation: Returns the square of the distance to the other vector (faster than .distance()).

label: rawBlockPos
documentation: Returns a Minecraft BlockPos with rounded vector values.

label: ZERO
documentation: Static zero vector (0, 0, 0). Do not operate/manipulate this object.

label: XP
documentation: Static vector with value (1, 0, 0). Do not operate/manipulate this object.

label: YP
documentation: Static vector with value (0, 1, 0). Do not operate/manipulate this object.

label: ZP
documentation: Static vector with value (0, 0, 1). Do not operate/manipulate this object.

label: Matrices
documentation: Manages a stack of transformation matrices to apply translations and rotations to rendered objects.

label: Matrices
documentation: Returns a new Matrices instance, initially containing one unit matrix.

label: translate
detail: Matrices.translate(x: float, y: float, z: float): void
documentation: Adds a translation transformation (x, y, z) to the current matrix state.

label: rotateX
documentation: Rotates the matrix along the X axis in radians.

label: rotateY
documentation: Rotates the matrix along the Y axis in radians.

label: rotateZ
documentation: Rotates the matrix along the Z axis in radians.

label: rotateXDegrees
documentation: Rotates the matrix along the X axis in degrees.

label: rotateYDegrees
documentation: Rotates the matrix along the Y axis in degrees.

label: rotateZDegrees
documentation: Rotates the matrix along the Z axis in degrees.

label: pushPose
documentation: Saves a copy of the current state onto the stack.

label: popPose
documentation: Resets the current state and restores the last saved state from the stack.

label: popPushPose
documentation: Shortcut that deletes the current state and then saves a copy of the restored state.
